name: Frozen Chocolate Banana
recipeIngredient: 1 medium banana, peeled and cut crosswise
recipeInstructions:
1. Wrap banana halves in wax paper or foil and freeze until hard.
2. Place a sheet of wax paper on a baking tray.
3. Spread half the cracker crumbs evenly over the wax paper.
4. Coat one banana half with about 1/2 teaspoon of chocolate syrup.
5. Roll the coated banana half in the remaining cracker crumbs.
6. Repeat steps 3-5 with the other banana half.
7. Serve immediately or wrap tightly in moisture- and vapor-resistant wrapping and store in the freezer until ready to use.
